features: Vitamin C and Retinol: Invigorate your skin with our Vitamin C Sleep Face Mask enriched with Retinol. This blend of potent ingredients brightens and moisturizes, enhancing the youthfulness of your skin.
Korean Beauty Standards: Rooted in the Korean skin care tradition, this face mask is designed to reduce wrinkles and smooth skin, leaving you with a radiant complexion upon waking.
Niacinamide and Glycolic Acid: Our face moisturizer is boosted with Niacinamide and Glycolic Acid, known for their skin-brightening and exfoliating properties, promoting a smoother skin texture.
DERMATOLOGIST TESTED, Vegan and Cruelty-Free: This overnight facial mask is 100% vegan and cruelty-free, aligning with your ethical values. Indulge in beauty sleep with a clear conscience.

POWERED BY 7 PEPTIDE MIX for Versatile Nighttime Care: Whether used as an overnight face mask, a sleeping mask, or a night cream, Our proprietary 7 peptide mix integrates easily into your nighttime skin care routine, rejuvenating your skin as you rest.
description: Product Description Yuzu Delivers powerful antioxidants and vitamins to protect skin from daily stressors and enhance visible radiance Niacinamide Minimizes the look of pores and improves uneven tone and texture Retinol Smooths and refines the appearance of skin’s texture while visibly enhancing radiance and addressing signs of aging YUZU Eye Cream Toner Peel Gel Brightening Mask Melting Balm to Oil Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,197 4.4 out of 5 stars 155 4.7 out of 5 stars 877 4.4 out of 5 stars 160 4.5 out of 5 stars 143 Price £20.40 £ 20 . 40 £25.00 £ 25 . 00 £18.70 £ 18 . 70 — no data £24.65 £ 24 . 65 Benefit Hydrate, Helps blur the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles Targets pore concerns, Helps improve the look of balanced, clear skin Cleanse, Improve Dullness Help diminish the look of a dull complexion Makeup removal, deep cleanse and nourish Frequency Twice a day, morning and evening Three to five times per week.
